name: Container restart loop
triggers: container restart count exceeds threshold in rolling window
facts_to_gather: deploy or config changes preceding loop
classification_rules: if exit code is 137 and host memory pressure is high then likely oom_or_memory_pressure
if restart loop begins immediately after deploy then likely bad_config_or_startup_path
if disk nearly full then likely write_or_start_failure
verification_checks: container remains healthy for configured interval
memory or disk pressure is reduced or stable
improvement_prompts: Should memory limits or alerts be adjusted?
Do we need pre-deploy health validation?
Should this incident auto-correlate with disk and memory metrics?
